benefits.description: Warm, body-wide flushing feeling with increased blood flow to skin

side_effects.description: Warm, body-wide flushing feeling along with increased blood flow to the skin

protocol_notes: OP states subcutaneous injection is one of the most bioavailable administration routes. Reports personal enjoyment of flushing effect though acknowledges others may find it unpleasant. Notes oxytocin production declines after age 27.
